title: [ExportVerilog] Fix crash on `sv.reg` with initial value

features.name: sv_reg with init attribute creating backedge
features.description: Code should include an sv.reg operation with an init attribute combined with sv.read_inout to create a backedge

features.name: sv_read_inout feeding combinational logic with backedge
features.description: Code should include an sv.read_inout operation whose result is used in combinational logic, creating a backedge that cannot be resolved
